meta.targetSemantics: MCV1_TARGET = annual MCV1 doses (thousands), incl. 25% wastage

costConfig.note: Target already includes 25% wastage. children_covered = target*0.75; doses(w) = children_covered/(1-w); cost = doses*1000*pricePerDose.

optimistic.label: OPTIMISTIC
optimistic.description: Strong health system, declining mortality, stable births

pessimistic.label: PESSIMISTIC
pessimistic.description: Health system stress, rising mortality, declining coverage

pandemic.label: PANDEMIC SHOCK
pandemic.description: COVID-like disruption: coverage drops, migration halts
